headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Apr 20, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — April 20, 2026 SNAPSHOT Mixed risk regime as equities rally despite Persian Gulf shipping crisis. Tech leadership emerges while energy underperforms paradoxically.
